title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a split-brain AI architecture for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced two humanoid robots, Dyno and VR-H3, for security and industrial work. NVIDIA released Isaac GR00T, an open humanoid robot reference platform based on Unitree H2 with Jetson Thor compute.
